cloud_chapter:
## What You Will Learn

In this chapter, you will master the fundamentals of cloud computing, including cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), deployment models, and key cloud platforms. You will learn how to deploy, manage, and scale applications in the cloud.

### Key Concepts
- Core concepts and syntax for this chapter
- Practical implementation patterns
- Common pitfalls and best practices

### Why This Matters
Cloud skills are essential for building scalable, resilient, and cost-effective infrastructure in modern IT environments.
